creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #1)

> 3.0.0

Not yet in latest for CURRENT. 

So, after a few lengthy builds with poudriere: 

----

root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:~ # pkg -r /tmp/up upgrade -f -n qutebrowser

I'll restart the OS then test 3.0.0 (I don't imagine a problem).
